title: Dungeons and Taverns Stronghold Overhaul LITE edition
description: Server and low end PC friendly version of DnT Stronghold Overhaul
body:
## This is the Lite Edition of DnT Stronghold Overhaul which is much more server and low end PC friendly

For the Normal DnT Stronghold Overhaul, head over [here](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns-stronghold-overhaul)

This datapack/mod is part of the [Dungeons and Taverns](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dungeon-and-taverns) series, but **does not require** Dungeons and Taverns to work. The main Dungeons and Taverns mod **does NOT include** this mod's features. If you would like more structures similar to this one, then check [my profile!](https://www.curseforge.com/members/nova_wostra/projects)

It adds 39 rooms only, instead of 417 Rooms from the Full DnT Stronghold Overhaul
